incoterms.description: CIF required per logistics framework LF-2024-EP

port_of_loading.description: Shanghai origin port per supplier agreement SA-CN-011

port_of_discharge.description: Rotterdam destination per routing agreement RA-NL-003

shipment_mode.description: Ocean freight required per cost framework CF-2024-EP

origin_country.description: Goods must originate from China per supply contract SC-EP-2024

consignee_name.description: Consignee must include EuroParts entity name per billing procedure BP-EP-001
